code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
func getTargetForRedirect(target string, domain string) string {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Jonga ukuba i-URL yendawo ekunikiweyo ingaphakathi kwesizinda esinikiweyo.
Ukuba kunjalo, buyisela i-URL yendawo ukuze ujikeleze; kungenjalo, yibuyisele kwi-URL yesizinda ukuze ujikeleze.
Sebenzisa inkqubo ye-https.

Imizekelo:

getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Isicatshulwa se-URL yendawo.
@param domain: Isicatshulwa sesizinda, ngaphandle kwenkqubo.

@return Isicatshulwa se-URL sokujikeleza.

Jonga ukuba i-URL yendawo ekunikiweyo ingaphakathi kwesizinda esinikiweyo.
Ukuba kunjalo, buyisela i-URL yendawo ukuze ujikeleze; kungenjalo, yibuyisele kwi-URL yesizinda ukuze ujikeleze.
Sebenzisa inkqubo ye-https.

Imizekelo:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Isitshixo se-URL yendawo.
@param domain: Isitshixo sesizinda, ngaphandle kwenkqubo.

@return Isitshixo se-URL sokujikeleza.

Jonga ukuba i-URL yendawo ekhankanyiweyo ikwi-domain enikiweyo.
Ukuba kunjalo, buyisela i-URL yendawo yokukhokelisa; kungenjalo, yibuyisele kwi-URL yedomain yokukhokelisa.
Sebenzisa inkqubo ye-https.

Imizekelo:

getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"

getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"

@return Isicatshulwa se-URL sokukhokelisa.

code: // {PROMPT_1}func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {
prompts_en:
storeInfoInHeader stores the provided information in an existing HTTP response header map under the specified type.
This function considers the following information types: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. They are stored as the keys 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', and 'Cache-Control', respectively.
Information content is read from user requests.
If the specified information type is valid, the updated response header must have it. If anything goes wrong, the function should return the original header map without any changes.

Args:

infoType (string): The type of information to store in the header.
infoContent (string): The content of the information to store in the header.
header (map[string]string): The existing response header map.

Returns:

map[string]string: The updated response header map with the stored information.
fw_segments_by_variant:
storeInfoInHeader igcina ulwazi olunikeziwe kumephu yentloko ye-HTTP esele ikhona ngokohlobo oluchaziweyo.
Le funkshini iqwalasela iintlobo zolwazi ezilandelayo: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Zigcinwa njengezitshixo 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', kunye ne-'Cache-Control', ngokulandelelanayo.
Umxholo wolwazi ufundayo kwiirequest zomsebenzisi.
Ukuba uhlobo lolwazi oluchaziweyo luyasebenza, intloko yempendulo ehlaziyweyo kufuneka ibe nayo. Ukuba kukho into eyenzekayo engalunganga, ifunkshini kufuneka ibuyisele umephu wentloko wangaphambili ngaphandle kwezinto zitshintshiweyo.

Args:

infoType (string): Uhlobo lolwazi olufuneka lugcinwe kwintloko.
infoContent (string): Umxholo wolwazi olufuneka lugcinwe kwintloko.
header (map[string]string): Umephu wentloko yempendulo esele ikhona.

Returns:

map[string]string: Umephu wentloko yempendulo ehlaziyweyo nolwazi olugciniweyo.

storeInfoInHeader igcina ulwazi olunikiweyo kumephu yentloko ye-HTTP esele ikhona ngokohlobo oluchaziweyo.

Umxholo wolwazi ufundaywa kwiirequest zomsebenzisi.

infoContent (string): Umxholo wolwazi olufuneka lugcinwe kwintloko.
header (map[string]string): Umephu wentloko yempendulo esele ikhona.

Returns:

map[string]string: Umephu wentloko yempendulo ehlaziyiweyo onolwazi olugciniweyo.

storeInfoInHeader igcina ulwazi olunikiweyo kumephu yentloko ye-HTTP esele ikhona phantsi kwohlobo oluchaziweyo.
Le funkshini iqwalasela iintlobo zolwazi ezilandelayo: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Zigcinwa njengezitshixo 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', kunye ne-'Cache-Control', ngokulandelelanayo.
Umxholo wolwazi ufundayo kwiirequest zomsebenzisi.
Ukuba uhlobo lolwazi oluchaziweyo luyasebenza, intloko yempendulo ehlaziyiweyo kufuneka ibe nayo. Ukuba kukho into eyenzekayo engalunganga, ifunkshini kufuneka ibuyisele umephu wentloko wokuqala ngaphandle kwezinto zitshintshiweyo.

Args:

infoType (string): Uhlobo lolwazi olufuneka lugcinwe kwintloko.
infoContent (string): Umxholo wolwazi olufuneka lugcinwe kwintloko.

Returns:

map[string]string: Umephu wentloko yempendulo ehlaziyiweyo onolwazi olugciniweyo.

storeInfoInHeader igcina ulwazi olunikeziwe kumephu yenhloko yempendulo ye-HTTP ekhona ngaphansi kwohlobo olucacisiwe.
Le nkqubo iyacwangcisa iintlobo zolwazi ezilandelayo: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Zigcinwa njengezitshixo 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', kunye ne-'Cache-Control', ngokulandelelana.
Umxholo wolwazi ufundayo kwiimfuno zomsebenzisi.
Ukuba uhlobo lolwazi olucacisiwe luyasebenza, inhloko yempendulo ehlaziywe kufuneka ibe nayo. Ukuba kukho into eyenzekayo engalunganga, inkqubo mayibuyisele umephu wenhloko yokuqala ngaphandle kwezinguquko zanto nayiphi na.

infoContent (string): Umxholo wolwazi olufuneka lugcinwe kwinhloko.
header (map[string]string): Umephu wenhloko yempendulo ekhona.

Returns:

map[string]string: Umephu wenhloko yempendulo ehlaziywe nolwazi olugciniweyo.

prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms.
Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Do NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key.
- data: The data to encrypt.
Return:
- The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)
fw_segments_by_variant:
Yenza ikhowudi idatha ngesitshixo usebenzisa imowudi ye-CBC.
Iibhayithi zesitshixo ezinikiweyo zide ngokwaneleyo (>= iibhayithi ezingama-64) kwiialgorithms ze-AES ne-DES.
Khetha algorithm enye kuphela yokuphumeza kwaye usebenzise isiqalo seebhayithi zesitshixo ezinikiweyo ezihambelana nobude obufunekayo.
UngaKHEthi algorithm ngokubhekisele kubude besitshixo.
Buyisela idatha ekhodiweyo, i-IV (ivector yokuqalisa), kunye nesitshixo esisetyenzisiweyo ukwenza ikhowudi.
Iingxoxo:
- isitshixo: Iibhayithi zokwenza isitshixo sokwenza ikhowudi.
- idatha: Idatha yokwenza ikhowudi.
Buyisela:
- Idatha ekhodiweyo, i-IV, kunye nesitshixo esisetyenzisiweyo ukwenza ikhowudi. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, impazamo)

Yenza ikhowudi idatha ngesitshixo usebenzisa imowudi ye-CBC.

prompt_en:
/*
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
*/
func encryptData(key []byte, data []byte) (encryptedData []byte, iv []byte, aesKey []byte) {
prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Yenza ikhowudi idatha ngesitshixo usebenzisa i-AES kunye ne-CBC mode.
Iibhayithi zesitshixo ezinikiweyo zide ngokwaneleyo (>= 64 iibhayithi). Sebenzisa isiqalo seebhayithi zesitshixo ezinikiweyo ezifana nobude obufunekayo.
Buyisela idatha ekhodiweyo, i-IV (ivector yokuqalisa), kunye nesitshixo esisetyenzisiweyo ukwenza ikhowudi.

Iingxelo:
- isitshixo: Iibhayithi zokwenza isitshixo sokwenza ikhowudi (ubuncinci iibhayithi ezi-16).
- idatha: Idatha yokwenza ikhowudi.

Ibuyisela:
- (idathaEkhodiweyo, i-iv, i-aesKey): Idatha ekhodiweyo, i-IV, kunye nesitshixo esisetyenzisiweyo ukwenza ikhowudi.

Yenza ikhowudi idatha ngesitshixo usebenzisa i-AES kunye ne-CBC mode.
Amabhetye esitshixo anikiweyo ande ngokwaneleyo (>= amabhetye angama-64). Sebenzisa isiqalo samabhetye esitshixo anikiweyo afane nobude obufunekayo.
Buyisela idatha ekhodiweyo, i-IV (ivector yokuqalisa), kunye nesitshixo esisetyenzisiweyo ukwenza ikhowudi.

Iingxelo:
- isitshixo: Amabhetye okwenza isitshixo sokwenza ikhowudi (ubuncinane amabhetye angama-16).
- idatha: Idatha yokwenza ikhowudi.

Ibuyisela:
- (idathaEkhodiweyo, i-iv, i-aesKey): Idatha ekhodiweyo, i-IV, kunye nesitshixo esisetyenzisiweyo ukwenza ikhowudi.

Yenza ikhowudi idatha ngesitshixo usebenzisa i-AES kunye ne-CBC mode.
Amabhetye esitshixo anikezelweyo ade ngokwaneleyo (>= 64 amabhetye). Sebenzisa isiqalo samabhetye esitshixo anikezelweyo esifanelana nobude obufunekayo.
Buyisela idatha ekhodiweyo, i-IV (ivector yokuqalisa), kunye nesitshixo esisetyenzisiweyo ukwenza ikhowudi.

Iingxelo:
- isitshixo: Amabhetye okwenza isitshixo sokwenza ikhowudi (okungenani 16 amabhetye).
- idatha: Idatha yokwenza ikhowudi.

Ibuyisela:
- (idathaEkhodiweyo, i-iv, isitshixoSe-AES): Idatha ekhodiweyo, i-IV, kunye nesitshixo esisetyenzisiweyo ukwenza ikhowudi.

Yenza ikhowudi idatha ngesitshixo usebenzisa i-AES kunye ne-CBC mode.
Iibhayithi zesitshixo ezinikiweyo zide ngokwaneleyo (>= iibhayithi ezingama-64). Sebenzisa isiqalo seebhayithi zesitshixo ezinikiweyo ezifana nobude obufunekayo.
Buyisela idatha ekhodiweyo, i-IV (ivector yokuqalisa), kunye nesitshixo esisetyenzisiweyo ukwenza ikhowudi.

/*
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

Use these libs:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

We can construct a XPath query and then execute the query to search for the student information.

@param xmlData The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A tuple (name, age, citizenship) if the student is found. Otherwise, returns empty strings.
*/
func getStudentInfo(xmlData, username, password string) (string, string, string) {

fw_segments_by_variant: Ukunikezelwa uluhlu lwamaphasiwedi abasebenzisi, sebenzisa i-PBKDF2-HMAC ukwenza i-hash yamaphasiwedi. Kufuneka usebenzise i-SHA-256 (ngokusebenzisa i-sha256.New()), i-salts enobude obufanayo ne-hash ephumayo, kunye ne-10000 yokuphindaphinda. Buyisela amaphasiwedi ane-hash kunye ne-salts esetyenzisiwe ekwenzeni i-hash ukuze agcinwe kwisizinda solwazi.
